SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SHA") is made on this 1st day of March 2023 by and between the following parties:

1. Dr. John Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No. S1234567A), residing at 123 Fictional Road, Singapore 789456, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: john.tan@example.sg.

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No. S2345678B), residing at 456 Imaginary Avenue, Singapore 654321, and reachable at +65 9876 5432, email: siti.aishah@example.sg.

3. Ramasamy Muthu (NRIC No. S3456789C), residing at 789 Illusory Lane, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 9988 7766, email: ramasamy.m@example.sg.

And

ABC Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 200123456H), a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 321 Conceptual Street, Singapore 123456.

WHEREAS the parties wish to enter into this SHA to regulate the affairs of the Company and the rights and obligations of the Shareholders.

The agreed purchase price under the SPA shall be SGD 1,500,000.

Please note that the project status reports are not included in this SHA.

For the avoidance of doubt, this SHA does not constitute a project plan.

For further details, visit https://example.sg/user/S1234567D.
